rationale: Educ. Code §11.353 governs eligibility for admission to military reservation school districts. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A child is eligible to attend school in a military reservation school district if the child is eligible under Section 25.001 and is the child of an officer, soldier, or civilian employee residing or employed on the reservation.
_note: No textual or topical relationship between the proposed change and this rule.
